title: lomatium foeniculaceum var. daucifolium
intro: Lomatium foeniculaceum var. daucifolium, also known as meadow lomatium, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other compounds. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Lomatium foeniculaceum var. daucifolium can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder, and is often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
